description.value: You use the magic of the unlit star to decrease the power of nearby shadows. The shadow gargoyle's resistances are lowered by 2 until the start of your next turn. Additionally, the shadow gargoyle must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:17] saving throw. On a failure, the shadow gargoyle must stop flying immediately and land in the nearest open space below it. You can use Diminish Shadow only once per turn.

publication.title: Pathfinder Beginner Box: Secrets of the Unlit Star
